description_long: This stereo sound system consists of a large, rectangular speaker cabinet with a black, textured exterior and visible signs of wear and rust, suggesting heavy use in an urban environment. The front face features a prominent circular woofer protected by a metal mesh grille, with a smaller tweeter and horn above it. Metal corner protectors and recessed handles are present on the sides for easier transport. The speaker sits on a checkered mat alongside a weathered wooden crate, which has stickers and a slatted design, adding to the urban, utilitarian aesthetic. The speaker's surface is mostly matte with some roughness, and the grille has a diamond mesh pattern. No visible control panels, screens, or ports are apparent from any angle.
description: A large, rugged black stereo speaker with a metal mesh grille and visible wear, paired with a weathered wooden crate. The speaker features metal corner protectors and recessed handles, giving it a utilitarian, urban look.
description_view_0: The front and left side of the speaker are visible, showing the large woofer behind a metal mesh grille and the wooden crate beside it.
description_view_1: The left side of the speaker is shown, highlighting the recessed handle and the depth of the cabinet, with the crate partially obscured.
description_view_2: The front and right side of the speaker are visible, displaying the woofer, tweeter, and horn, as well as the crate's slatted face and stickers.
description_view_3: The rear and right side of the speaker are shown, focusing on the plain back panel and another recessed handle, with the crate mostly hidden.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Diamond-shaped metal mesh grille with a regular, crisscross pattern covering the woofer and tweeter areas.
